violations.text: Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the back-room area during time of inspection. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. PIC refilled soap dispenser. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

Observed various cleaning chemicals stored above equipment, utensils, or single service items. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. PIC relocated cleaning chemicals to designated area. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
Observed the non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine with biofilm at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025

Observed the pre-flush spray hose at the 3-bay hanging below the flood rim. A plumbing system shall be installed to prevent backflow of a liquid or gas contaminant into the water supply by providing an air gap or installing an approved backflow prevention device. PIC adjusted spray hose. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/10/2025
No person certified in food safety was present as needed at the time of inspection. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the three bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of biofilm. New Violation. Correct By: 01/22/2024
